The '''langlatch''' was an animal with grayish skin native to [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].<ref name="SWG" /> The langlatch was a very aggressive and voracious predator that ate indiscriminately warm or cold-blooded creatures and were known to attack prey much larger than themselves.<ref name="SWG:L" /> Male langlatches walked on four legs while the females primarily walked on two legs, using their front arms for taking care of their offspring. Langlatches were roaming animals usually hunted for their hides and meat.<ref name="Sony">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Star%20Wars%20Galaxies:%20Bestiary%20-%20Lok|text=Star Wars Galaxies: Bestiary – Lok}}</ref>

Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], field researchers discovered giant langlatches on Lok.<ref name="Sony" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the collector [[Breac Slaus]] tasked a group of spacers to hunt and kill an unreasonable number of langlatches.<ref name="SWG:LL">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Langlatch Liquidator}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Langlatch_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Langlatches appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
